sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Zingsang tuh ding hi ki-itna khaici tuh in
Sun a tuh bang zanin zong tuth in a cin
A at hun ngak inla a khop hun zong ngak in
Lungdamna tawh buhlomte i khawm ding hi

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Buhlomte khawm in buhlomte khawm in
Lungdamna tawh buhlomte i khawm ding hi
Lungdamna tawh buhlomte i khawm ding hi

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Nisa sungah tuh in a liap sung zong tuh in
Phalbi le tuuklai lungmanna om lopi
Nasep na zawh ciangin kikhop hun hong tung ding
Lungdamna tawh buhlomte i khawm ding hi

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Kap kawmin pai inla Topa ading tuh in
Kisiatna in a hong dah sak hang a ci
Kahna khit ciangin ah Topa hong sam ding a
Lungdamna tawh buhlomte i khawm ding hi
